image:image.image:title: Oyenuga Joshua — Sharpman | Web Developer in Lagos Nigeria
image:image.image:caption: Sharpman is the personal web development brand of Oyenuga Joshua, a full stack developer in Lagos, Nigeria.

image:image.image:title: Oyenuga Joshua Portrait — Sharpman
image:image.image:caption: Oyenuga Joshua, founder of Sharpman, web developer and entrepreneur in Lagos, Nigeria.
